audience.primary: Short-form viewers seeking high-retention, niche-relevant value or emotion
audience.psychographic: scroll-stoppers, commenters, savers, and series followers
audience.avoid: generic mass-audience fluff with no niche specificity

tone_rules.voice_style: direct, concrete, platform-native; show don't lecture
tone_rules.pacing: hook immediately, escalate value or tension, land payoff before drop-off
must_include: one concrete detail that anchors the video to this niche
one reason the viewer should care in the first 3 seconds
one payoff that matches the hook promise
must_avoid: tone that does not match the declared niche

visual_dna.core_aesthetic: niche-appropriate, clean subject focus, mobile-first framing

character_consistency.rule: keep subject identity and wardrobe consistent within an episode unless the beat requires change
character_consistency.face_reveal_policy: show the subject clearly when trust or emotion matters for the niche

forbidden_visuals: off-niche stock aesthetics with no story purpose

tiktok.cta_style: comment, follow, or part 2 when serial
tiktok.audio_priority: immediate clarity; strong opening sound or voice

youtube_shorts.caption_style: searchable first line plus supporting detail
youtube_shorts.title_style: curiosity title with one concrete noun
youtube_shorts.cta_style: follow for more / full context in comments
youtube_shorts.pacing_note: one extra setup beat allowed if retention stays dense

instagram_reels.title_style: cover frame and first caption line carry the hook
instagram_reels.audio_priority: visual-first; music or voice supports mood

hook_class_definitions.violation: Open with something that breaks the viewer's expectation of normal.
hook_class_definitions.incomplete_truth: State a partial fact that implies a larger unseen payoff.
hook_class_definitions.personal_threat: Make the viewer feel the scenario could apply to them.
hook_class_definitions.moral_discomfort: Present a tension that feels ethically or emotionally wrong.
hook_class_definitions.false_safety: Start normal, then rupture with one precise wrong detail.
hook_class_definitions.open_loop_seed: End the hook on a question the viewer needs answered.

mode_definitions.quick_tip: One high-value insight delivered fast with proof or demo.
mode_definitions.storytime: Narrative arc with setup, turn, and payoff.
mode_definitions.comparison: Contrast two options, paths, or outcomes.
mode_definitions.myth_busting: Challenge a common belief in the niche.
mode_definitions.before_after: Transformation or reveal across the runtime.

act_2.label: escalation_beats
act_2.goal: deliver value or tension in rising beats

act_3.label: payoff_beat
act_3.goal: payoff that satisfies or strategically subverts the hook

tag.label: loop_seed
tag.goal: open loop for comments, saves, or next episode

beat_blocks.implementation: Motion, contrast, or subject focus in frame 0
Complete the hook promise in one line or text card
First value beat, detail, or story turn
Raise stakes, proof, or emotional intensity
Main payoff, reveal, or emotional peak
CTA, sequel seed, or comment driver

regeneration_directives.topic_collision: Change topic angle; keep hook structure if strong.
regeneration_directives.hook_collision: Keep topic; change hook class and opening.

banned_phrases: what happened next will shock you
make sure to like and subscribe
banned_structures: generic advice with no proof or detail
three unrelated points with no narrative spine
copy-paste template cadence with no niche voice
ai_tell_patterns: listing emotions instead of showing them
perfectly generic sentences with no niche specificity
vague descriptions with no concrete anchor
required_originality_signals: at least one niche-specific detail per brief
one line that would not fit a generic template
one concrete object, result, or identifier

forbidden: single-word spam tags with no story relevance

must_avoid: text-only thumbnail with no visual tension
